oneOf.title: ADR
oneOf.description: American Depositary Receipts. Identifies a depositary receipt that are issued only by U.S. banks for foreign stocks that are traded on a U.S. exchange.

oneOf.title: EDR
oneOf.description: European Depositary Receipts. Identifies a depositary receipt that are issued only by European banks for foreign stocks that are traded on a European exchange.

oneOf.title: GDR
oneOf.description: Global Depositary Receipts. Identifies a depositary receipt that is listed on European and other international exchanges.

oneOf.title: IDR
oneOf.description: Indian Depositary Receipts. Identifies a depositary receipt that are issued only by domestic depositories for foreign stocks that are traded on an Indian exchange.
